theme: Sunday Funday Finals — World Cup Semifinal Hype

assets.prompt: 10-second vertical cinematic video clip. Shot: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain, large gold hoop earrings, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick — she raises the gold whistle to her lips and blows, triggering an explosion of gold confetti raining from above. Movement: camera slowly pushes in from mid-shot to close-up as the whistle blows. Character action: she blows the whistle then lowers it with a slow powerful smile, eyes locked on camera. Lighting: warm directional gold spotlight from above, cinematic. Atmosphere: stadium crowd roar sound implied, dark emerald green background transitions to casino floor, a soccer ball rolls into frame and morphs into a spinning gold casino chip. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green black gold. Audio cue: gold whistle sound followed by crowd roar.

Full-body portrait shot. Setting: dark emerald green casino floor with subtle gold floor markings suggesting a soccer pitch, soft stadium lighting from above. Character: male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, enormous warm smile, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers plus a small soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks one green one gold visible above brown loafers. Pose: he holds out both hands — in his left hand a 4-leaf clover, in his right hand a gold casino chip, both on display like trophies. Expression: pure gleeful excitement, largest smile possible. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, cinematic. Foreground: a gold confetti piece floating near camera. Background: dark emerald green with soft golden bokeh lights. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium full-body shot, slightly low angle to make him look triumphant.

Vertical portrait shot for Stories. Setting: dark emerald background with subtle gold stadium lighting rays from above. Character: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick. Pose: she points directly at camera with one hand, confident expression, other hand on hip. The point feels like she is asking the viewer a question. Lighting: dramatic directional gold light from directly above, cinematic. Foreground: gold particles floating in the air. Background: dark emerald with faint silhouettes of a stadium and casino lights merging. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: close-medium portrait shot from slightly above. Space in upper third and lower third for text overlay by Luis.

Wide portrait shot. Setting: entrance of a glowing luxury casino with dark green walls and gold accents — the floor has faint gold lines suggesting a soccer pitch, blending casino and stadium aesthetics. Grand arched entrance with warm golden light pouring through. Character: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick. Pose: both arms extended wide in a welcoming embrace gesture, warm smile, head slightly tilted in invitation. She stands at the entrance, gold spotlight from above haloing her. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above and behind creating a halo effect, cinematic. Foreground: gold carpet leading toward her, rose petals mixed with gold confetti on the floor. Background: elegant casino interior glowing emerald and gold. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury premium aesthetic. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium wide shot at eye level.

Vertical shot for Stories. Setting: dark casino floor, spin wheel visible in the background showing it landed one spot away from the jackpot. Character: male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with stickers, mismatched lucky socks. Pose: both hands on his cheeks in an exaggerated shocked-but-amused expression — wide eyes, mouth open mid-gasp, eyebrows raised high, slight grin breaking through like he knows his luck is building. His 4-leaf clover glows faintly gold in his shirt pocket. Lighting: warm casino ambient light from above, slight comic dramatic shadow under eyes for expressiveness. Foreground: a single gold coin spinning on its edge near his feet. Background: slot machine reels visible blurred in background, one stop short. Style: photorealistic but with slightly heightened expressiveness, cinematic. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: close medium shot, slightly low angle. Space at top and bottom for text overlay.

Vertical portrait shot for Stories. Setting: dark emerald background with atmospheric golden haze, large analogue-style gold clock face slightly blurred in background showing time approaching 3. Character: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain, gold crown-style headpiece, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick. Pose: she holds up three fingers directly toward camera, close to lens, other hand behind her back, knowing half-smile, one eyebrow slightly raised — the gesture is confident and suggestive of a countdown. Lighting: warm directional gold from above, dramatic shadows. Foreground: three gold coins arranged like a hat trick scoreboard near bottom edge. Background: softly blurred gold clock. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, mystery and anticipation mood. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: close medium portrait, slightly below eye level looking up at her.

Wide portrait duo shot. Setting: dark emerald casino floor with gold goal net hanging behind them, coins cascading out of the goal net like scoring a goal. Penalty spot visible on the dark green floor as a single glowing gold circle. Character 1 (LADY E): Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, black and gold striped referee-inspired dress, gold whistle on chain, gold crown headpiece, bronze-brown skin, crimson lips — she holds a glowing gold penalty spot marker in her right hand, arm extended toward camera, confident smile. Character 2 (LUCKY LOU): beside her, male character, green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with stickers, mismatched lucky socks — he holds a gold card in his left hand displaying a QR-code-like pattern, huge grin, free hand giving a thumbs up. Both characters stand shoulder to shoulder facing camera. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above on both characters, cinematic. Foreground: goal net raining gold coins, gold confetti. Background: dark emerald casino with subtle stadium lighting. Style: photorealistic, cinematic. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium wide shot at eye level.

Square crop duo shot. Same scene as 07_image_referral_penalty_kick. Setting: dark emerald casino floor with gold goal net behind them raining coins. Character 1 (LADY E): Black female character, black and gold striped referee-inspired dress, gold whistle, gold crown headpiece, bronze-brown skin, crimson lips — holding glowing gold penalty marker, warm smile engaging the viewer. Character 2 (LUCKY LOU): green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks — holding a gold referral card, enormous grin, free hand waving at camera like welcoming a friend. Both looking directly at camera. Lighting: warm directional gold from above, cinematic. Foreground: cascading gold coins from goal net. Background: dark green with golden stadium bokeh. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, community warmth. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium square crop, both characters centered.

Dramatic portrait shot. Setting: dark emerald casino floor with stadium floodlights serving as casino spotlights from directly above, single glowing penalty spot circle on the dark green floor in foreground with a single spinning gold casino chip on it. Character: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, black and gold striped referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on chain, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick. Pose: she holds a glowing gold boot trophy aloft in her right hand, arm fully extended upward, chin raised, triumphant expression — regal and commanding. Left hand on hip. Lighting: dramatic stadium floodlight from directly above creating god-ray effect in the darkness, warm gold, cinematic. Foreground: gold casino chips stacked like a penalty spot base beneath the spinning chip. Background: dark emerald casino interior fading to black at edges. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury premium, dramatic lighting hero shot. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low angle looking up at Lady E holding the boot high.

Vertical close-medium portrait for Stories. Same dramatic energy as 08. Setting: dark emerald with stadium floodlight from above. Character: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, black and gold striped referee-inspired dress, gold whistle raised in her right hand instead of the boot — she blows it toward camera, eyes locked on viewer. Expression: electrifying, commanding, exciting. The gold whistle glows slightly. Lighting: god-ray stadium light from above, cinematic. Foreground: gold confetti and coin fragments near bottom edge. Background: dark emerald fading to black with golden particle dust. Style: photorealistic, cinematic. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: close medium portrait, low angle looking up. Space at top and bottom thirds for text overlay by Luis.

12-second vertical cinematic video clip. Shot: Male character in green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with stickers, mismatched lucky socks — standing on dark emerald casino floor. Movement: camera is static, then shakes slightly on each chip appearance for impact. Character action: Lucky Lou watches as first gold casino chip appears floating in the air before him — he reacts with surprise and delight. Second chip appears — he points at it with growing excitement. Third chip appears — a soccer ball rolls into frame, morphs into the third chip, and all three explode in a burst of gold confetti and coins. Lucky Lou pumps both fists in the air, leaps slightly, biggest grin possible. Lighting: warm gold casino light from above, each chip arrival is punctuated by a gold flash. Atmosphere: casino ambiance with crowd cheer on third chip explosion. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green black gold. Audio cue: three satisfying 'ding' sounds building to a crowd roar on the third.

Wide group portrait shot. Setting: luxury dark emerald green VIP lounge with gold accents — large floor-to-ceiling windows in background showing a blurred stadium exterior with floodlights at night. Casino chips and gold coins on tables. Character group: 4-5 diverse players — men and women, varied ages 25-50, varied ethnicities, all wearing either casual casino-chic or green-and-gold soccer gear without real team logos, some wearing Lady E Luck green accessories. Pose: the group is mid-celebration — some clapping, some with arms raised, some laughing together, gold coins tossed in air between them. Pure joy, community, authentic connection. Lighting: warm gold from above and from window side, cinematic. Foreground: gold coins floating near camera, casino chips on table edge. Background: blurred stadium through large windows, gold bokeh. Style: photorealistic, warm, cinematic, luxury community aesthetic. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium wide group shot at eye level, slightly elevated.

Vertical dramatic portrait for Stories. Setting: near-total darkness except for a single narrow gold spotlight from directly above illuminating the character from crown to chest. A large ornate gold clock face is blurred softly in the dark background, showing time around 7:30. Character: tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square perfectly folded, wide-brim hat casting shadow over the upper half of face showing only jaw and lips, completely still posture. Pose: one gloved hand extends slowly toward camera holding a single large gold coin between thumb and forefinger — the coin catches the spotlight and glows intensely. The other hand is at his side. Absolute stillness and tension. Lighting: single narrow spotlight from above, everything else in deep shadow, the gold coin glowing. Foreground: the glowing coin takes up lower-center frame. Background: deep black with barely-visible clock face. Style: photorealistic, cinematic noir, luxury tension. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: close medium portrait, low angle. Space at top and bottom for Luis overlay.

Vertical dynamic shot for Stories. Setting: dark casino floor bathed in gold and emerald light, midnight clock on wall in soft background. Character: Male character in green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with stickers, mismatched lucky socks — he is spinning an oversized gold prize wheel that floats before him. The wheel's center features a design element resembling a spinning orb. Pose: both hands gripping the wheel rim, turning it with full body enthusiasm, eyes wide with pure excitement and anticipation, mouth open mid-shout of joy. His 4-leaf clover is pinned to his jersey glowing softly gold. Lighting: warm casino gold from above, motion blur on wheel to suggest speed, character sharp. Foreground: gold coin sparks flying from the spinning wheel. Background: dark emerald casino fading to black, clock showing near-midnight. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, high energy. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium vertical shot capturing Lucky Lou and full wheel. Space at top for text overlay.

Vertical cinematic portrait for Stories. Setting: near-complete darkness, single dramatic gold spotlight from directly above. A wrapped mystery prize box sits on a dark table in the foreground, glowing with gold light from within as if it contains something radiant. Character: tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, wide-brim hat with face half-shadowed. Pose: he steps slightly forward toward camera from the darkness — for the first time his posture has a slight forward lean, suggesting he is about to reveal something. His jaw and lips are faintly visible below the hat brim. One hand is on the mystery box, not touching it but hovering. Expression: imperceptible but one corner of lip slightly raised. Lighting: single tight gold spotlight, deep noir shadow everywhere else. The mystery box pulses with gold inner light. Foreground: box in foreground, character behind and above. Background: absolute darkness. Style: photorealistic cinematic noir, mystery and anticipation. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low angle close portrait, mystery box in foreground.

18-second vertical cinematic video clip — triumphant arc payoff. Shot: Male character in green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with stickers, mismatched lucky socks — standing on dark casino floor. Movement: camera starts close on his face showing exhausted anticipation, then pulls back wide as the win is revealed. Character action: Lucky Lou stands still, holding his 4-leaf clover with both hands looking at it — then it GLOWS gold. His eyes go wide. He looks up, and in that moment a massive explosion of gold coins and confetti bursts from above. He leaps into the air with both fists raised, spinning slightly. A soccer ball rolls in from the side and transforms into a jackpot burst of light. Lucky Lou lands, arms out wide, head back, laughing with absolute joy. Lighting: dramatic shift from dim suspense light to full warm golden celebration light as the win triggers. Atmosphere: celebration music swell implied, crowd roar. Style: photorealistic cinematic, triumphant. Color: dark green black gold with gold burst. Audio cue: suspense silence, then coin ding, then explosion of celebration sound.

Vertical cinematic portrait for Stories. Setting: deep emerald darkness, late-night atmosphere. A large gold hourglass with sand slowly falling is positioned beside the character, glowing softly. Character: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, black and gold striped referee-inspired dress, gold whistle in hand at her side, gold crown headpiece, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick. Pose: one finger held gently to her lips in a 'shhh' gesture toward camera, knowing half-smile, the other hand holds the gold whistle loosely at her side. Eyes locked directly on camera — warm but mysterious. Her expression says she knows something incredible is coming. Lighting: low atmospheric emerald and gold ambient light, cinematic late-night noir softness. Foreground: single gold coin balanced on edge near bottom of frame, slowly settling. Background: emerald darkness, subtle gold particle dust floating. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, mysterious and warm simultaneously. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: close-medium portrait for Stories, slight low angle, space at top and bottom for text overlay.

assets.platform: Background for Reels + optional IG standalone
assets.prompt: Generate an original music track titled 'Golden Kick'. Genre: Afrobeats/Trap Fusion. BPM: 105. Key: F# minor. Instruments: Afrobeat guitar loop on offbeats, bouncing trap hi-hats with triplet rolls, booming 808 kick drum, brass section stabs on downbeats, layered crowd chant vocal sample, bright marimba melody on the hook, gold coin sound FX on beats 2 and 4. Mood: stadium anthem — electric, triumphant, community celebration, World Cup energy. Structure: Intro > Verse 1 > Pre-Chorus > Chorus > Verse 2 > Bridge > Final Chorus > Outro. Voice: Lady E character, Vesper preset, voice_id: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Lyrics provided — sing with warm authoritative confidence, afrobeats-influenced phrasing on verses, powerful belt on chorus. Full lyrics: [INTRO] Uh, Lady E Luck... yeah... World Cup Sunday... we came to WIN... [VERSE 1] Sunday mornin, whistle blow / Dark green casino, golden glow / Lucky Lou lace up his shoes / England Argentina, pick your crew / But in here we don't pick sides / We just ride the golden tide / Every spin is a corner kick / Every win comes real, real quick [PRE-CHORUS] Stack it up, stack it up / Hat trick by three / Bonus drop, bonus drop / Come play with Lady E / Golden boot in your hands / Feel that stadium crowd / When the whistle blow loud / We celebrate PROUD [CHORUS] Golden kick, golden kick / Lady E Luck is the place to be / Score big, score big / This Sunday energy is FREE / Spin that wheel, feel the thrill / Halftime reload, midnight fill / Golden kick, golden kick / We don't stop till the morning still [VERSE 2] Lucky Lou almost missed again / But that clover said my friend / This your time, this your night / Third recharge and the win in sight / Golden Dealer tip his hat / No words needed, that's a fact / When the final whistle ring / Lady E Luck brings everything [BRIDGE] Dai Dai, we ride / Stadium lights in our eyes / Coins fallin from the sky / We don't need to ask why / Just spin it, claim it / The Golden Hour, don't miss it / Ref blow the whistle / We already finished [FINAL CHORUS] Golden kick, golden kick / Lady E Luck is the place to be / Score big, score big / This Sunday energy is FREE / Spin that wheel, feel the thrill / Halftime reload, midnight fill / Golden kick, golden kick / We don't stop till the morning still [OUTRO] Lady E Luck... Sunday Funday Finals... Golden Boot Jackpot all day long... REF-FINALS-847... bring a friend... you BOTH win... Aye...

Voice: Lady E character. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'Sunday. Semifinal week. The whole world is watching — and Lady E Luck is READY. Your Golden Boot Jackpot is live all day. Biggest play wins the boot. Let's go.' Emotion: confident, electrifying, commanding authority with warmth underneath. Pacing: medium-slow, deliberate — each phrase lands fully before the next. Notes: pause after 'Sunday.' pause after 'READY.' build energy on 'Biggest play wins the boot.' end punchy on 'Let's go.'

Voice: Lucky Lou character. Preset: Leo. Voice ID: 73a45c18-0c56-4642-a61e-f6b303f8ded1. Text: 'Three recharges between three and six? That's my hat trick baby! Stack em all up — Lady E Luck gives you the bonus on every single one. I ALMOST missed it... but you know what? Lucky Lou NEVER misses twice!' Emotion: excited, enthusiastic, lovably dramatic, self-aware about the near-misses, triumphant at the end. Pacing: fast with pauses for comedic emphasis. Notes: 'hat trick baby' should have maximum excitement. 'I ALMOST missed it' should dip briefly to mock-sad then rocket back up on 'Lucky Lou NEVER misses twice.' Lovable and energetic throughout.

Voice: Golden Dealer character. Preset: Sterling. Voice ID: dc382508-c8bd-443c-8cb2-46e57b8d2e6f. Text: 'The second half always surprises.' Emotion: calm, mysterious, absolute certainty, slightly ominous warmth. Pacing: very slow and deliberate — every word is its own moment. Notes: this is the only sentence he speaks all day. It should feel like a statement of fact from someone who has seen everything. Low, rich, resonant. Silence before and after.

Voice: Lady E character. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'Your code is REF-FINALS-847. Share it. They join. You both get a free spin bonus. That's the Penalty Kick play — and everybody wins when you pass it right.' Emotion: warm, persuasive, inviting, generous. Pacing: smooth and conversational — the code is spoken clearly and at a slightly slower pace for listeners to catch it. Notes: 'REF-FINALS-847' should be spoken clearly with a slight pause before and after. 'everybody wins when you pass it right' should have a warm smile in the voice.
